ddls:
CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "angle" INTEGER /* Observation angle in degrees */,
  "wp05_1" REAL /* Measurement from WP05_1 telescope */,
  "wp05_2" REAL /* Measurement from WP05_2 telescope */,
  "wp05_3" REAL /* Measurement from WP05_3 telescope */,
  "wp06_1" REAL /* Measurement from WP06_1 telescope */,
  "wp06_2" REAL /* Measurement from WP06_2 telescope */,
  "wp06_3" REAL /* Measurement from WP06_3 telescope */,
  "obs_date" TEXT /* Date the observation was made */,
  "telescope_id" INTEGER /* ID of the telescope used for the observation */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observer who made the observation */,
  "obs_type" TEXT /* Type of observation (e.g., photometric, spectroscopic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_telescope_id FOREIGN KEY ("telescope_id") REFERENCES telescopes ("telescope_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "telescopes" (
  "telescope_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each telescope */,
  "telescope_name" TEXT /* Name of the telescope */,
  "observatory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the observatory where the telescope is located */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the telescope (e.g., optical, radio) */,
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Resolution of the telescope */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the telescope was last calibrated */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the telescope was last maintained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("telescope_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_telescopes_observatory_id FOREIGN KEY ("observatory_id") REFERENCES observatories ("observatory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_telescopes_resolution_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolution_id") REFERENCES resolutions ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_telescopes_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES telescope_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observatories" (
  "observatory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observatory */,
  "observatory_name" TEXT /* Name of the observatory */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the observatory */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the observatory */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the observatory director */,
  "director_email" TEXT /* Email address of the observatory director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observatory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "telescope_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each telescope type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the telescope type (e.g., optical, radio) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the telescope type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution */,
  "resolution_name" TEXT /* Name of the resolution (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observers" (
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observer */,
  "observer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the observer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the observer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the observer belongs to */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the observer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation log entry */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation being logged */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observer making the observation */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the observation was logged */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observation_logs_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observation_logs_observer_id FOREIGN KEY ("observer_id") REFERENCES observers ("observer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, FITS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., astronomer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the observation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the observation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_reduction" (
  "reduction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data reduction */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation being reduced */,
  "reduction_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was reduced */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for data reduction */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for data reduction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reduction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reduction_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being granted permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission being granted (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observatory_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "observatory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observatory using the instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observatory_instruments_observatory_id FOREIGN KEY ("observatory_id") REFERENCES observatories ("observatory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "telescope_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "telescope_id" INTEGER /* ID of the telescope using the instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_telescope_instruments_telescope_id FOREIGN KEY ("telescope_id") REFERENCES telescopes ("telescope_id")
)
